name: ShareFile Secure Document Management API
what_it_does: ShareFile (Cloud Software Group) secure document management REST API for file sharing, client portal, e-signature, and document workflow automation. Enables AI agents to manage secure file upload and client-facing document delivery for professional services document sharing, handle e-signature workflow and document approval for contract execution automation, access client portal and project management for professional services client collaboration, retrieve file request and document collection for client intake automation, manage folder structure and permission management for document access control, handle compliance archive and audit trail for regulated industry recordkeeping, access team file collaboration and versioning for document workflow management, retrieve notification and activity tracking for document workflow monitoring, manage integration with professional services ERP and CRM for unified document workflow, and integrate ShareFile with accounting software, legal platforms, and enterprise systems for automated document management.
use_cases: Sending client documents from professional services agents
Collecting signatures from contract automation agents
Requesting client files from intake agents
Archiving compliance documents from recordkeeping agents
not_for: Internal enterprise document management without client portal
Consumer file storage without professional services context
Engineering CAD/BIM document management without client collaboration
best_when: An accounting firm, law firm, financial advisory firm, or healthcare practice wanting AI agents to automate secure client document delivery, e-signature collection, file requests, client portal management, and compliance archiving.
avoid_when: HIPAA PHI IN HEALTHCARE FILE SHARING: ShareFile HIPAA edition with BAA required for healthcare PHI file sharing; automated file sharing of PHI without BAA creates HIPAA violation. Glassbox attorney-client privilege — automated legal document sharing through ShareFile must implement client-specific folder isolation; automated document misdirected to wrong client creates attorney-client privilege and confidentiality breach. FINRA/SEC document retention — automated financial services document management must comply with SEC Rule 17a-4 and FINRA 4511 retention and format requirements; automated deletion of required records creates broker-dealer compliance violation. Tax document handling — automated CPA firm document workflows must comply with IRS Circular 230 and state CPA board rules on client data handling; automated sharing of tax return data without client authorization creates Circular 230 violation.

auth.notes: ShareFile uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Raleigh, North Carolina HQ. Founded 2005. Acquired by Citrix Systems (2011), then spun into Cloud Software Group (private, Vista Equity/Evergreen Coast Capital, 2022). Professional services document management. HIPAA, FINRA compliance editions. Competes with Box, Dropbox Business, and NetDocuments for professional services document management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly subscription; team and enterprise tiers
pricing.notes: Raleigh, NC. Cloud Software Group (Vista Equity/Evergreen, private). Citrix-spun 2022. Founded 2005. Professional services document management. HIPAA and FINRA editions.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; large file uploads have separate limits

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA BAA FOR PHI: ShareFile HIPAA edition requires executed BAA for healthcare PHI document storage and sharing; automated file workflows with PHI without BAA creates HIPAA violation regardless of ShareFile security features

Client folder isolation for privilege — automated document routing must implement strict client-specific folder isolation; automated document delivery to wrong client folder creates attorney-client privilege breach and professional liability

SEC/FINRA retention automation — automated financial services document deletion must comply with SEC Rule 17a-4 WORM (write once read many) retention requirements for broker-dealer records; automated deletion of required retained records creates compliance violation

OAuth scope minimization — ShareFile OAuth supports granular scopes; automated agents should request minimum necessary scopes; broad scope credentials on compromise expose full client document library

Large file chunked upload — automated large file uploads must use ShareFile chunked upload API; single-request large file upload creates timeout failures for files over 100MB; implement multipart upload for all automated file operations
Cloud Software Group transition — Citrix spun ShareFile into Cloud Software Group (2022); verify current API documentation and platform stability post-separation from Citrix product ecosystem
agent_readiness.security_notes: Document management. SOC2, HIPAA, FINRA. OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Client documents and professional services data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Document management. SOC2, HIPAA, FINRA. OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Client and professional services documents.
